mapper.select:
SELECT S.CODE, S.REVCODE, S.PLANTCD, S.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.PARTTYPE, S.PROCESSCD, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), S.WDAY, 120) AS WDAY, S.REVNO, S.REVCONT, S.BIGO, S.REGDTM FROM TBL_INSP_STANDARD S LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON S.PARTNO = G.PARTNO INNER JOIN ( SELECT PARTNO, PROCESSCD, MAX(REVNO) AS MAX_REVNO FROM TBL_INSP_STANDARD GROUP BY PARTNO, PROCESSCD ) M ON S.PARTNO = M.PARTNO AND S.PROCESSCD = M.PROCESSCD AND S.REVNO = M.MAX_REVNO
1=1
AND (S.PARTNO LIKE #{part_no_nm} OR G.PARTNM LIKE #{part_no_nm})
AND G.PARTTYPE = #{part_gubun}
ORDER BY S.REGDTM DESC

SELECT S.CODE, S.REVCODE, S.PLANTCD, S.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.PARTTYPE, S.PROCESSCD, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), S.WDAY, 120) AS WDAY, S.REVNO, S.REVCONT, S.BIGO, S.REGDTM FROM TBL_INSP_STANDARD S LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON S.PARTNO = G.PARTNO WHERE S.PARTNO = #{part_no} AND S.PROCESSCD = #{process_cd} ORDER BY S.REVNO DESC
SELECT CODE, REVCODE, PLANTCD, PARTNO, PROCESSCD, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), WDAY, 120) AS WDAY, REVNO, REVCONT, BIGO FROM TBL_INSP_STANDARD WHERE CODE = #{CODE}
SELECT 'STD-' + #{date_str} + '-' + RIGHT('000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(CODE, 3) AS INT)), 0) + 1 AS VARCHAR), 3) AS NEW_CODE FROM TBL_INSP_STANDARD WHERE CODE LIKE 'STD-' + #{date_str} + '-%'
SELECT CODE, PCODE, ITEMCODE, ITEMSTEP, CHOYN, SELFYN, SAMPLEQTY, PERIOD, UNIT, OUTWARDVALUE, DIMSVALUE, PLUS, MINUS, BIGO FROM TBL_INSP_STANDARD_ITEM WHERE PCODE = #{PCODE} ORDER BY ITEMSTEP ASC

SELECT 'STI-' + #{date_str} + '-' + RIGHT('0000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(CODE, 4) AS INT)), 0) + 1 AS VARCHAR), 4) AS NEW_CODE FROM TBL_INSP_STANDARD_ITEM WHERE CODE LIKE 'STI-' + #{date_str} + '-%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_INSP_STANDARD_ITEM ( CODE, PCODE, ITEMCODE, ITEMSTEP, CHOYN, SELFYN, SAMPLEQTY, PERIOD, UNIT, OUTWARDVALUE, DIMSVALUE, PLUS, MINUS, BIGO, REGUSERID, REGDTM ) VALUES ( #{CODE}, #{PCODE}, ISNULL(#{ITEMCODE}, ''), ISNULL(#{ITEMSTEP}, 0), ISNULL(#{CHOYN}, 0), ISNULL(#{SELFYN}, 0), ISNULL(#{SAMPLEQTY}, 0), #{PERIOD}, #{UNIT}, #{OUTWARDVALUE}, #{DIMSVALUE}, #{PLUS}, #{MINUS}, #{BIGO}, 1, GETDATE() )
